azkar.text: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
azkar.transliteration: la ilaha illa Allah al-azim al-halīm, la ilaha illa Allah rabb al-'arsh al-'azim
azkar.translation: There is no god but Allah, the Most Great, the Most Forbearing. There is no god but Allah, Lord of the Great Throne.

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَنَ الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ وَرَحِيمَهُمَا ارْحَمْنِي رَحْمَةً تَغْنِينِي
azkar.transliteration: allahumma rahmanad dunya wa al-akhirah wa rahimatuhuma arhamni rahmatan taghnini
azkar.translation: O Allah, Merciful of this world and the Hereafter, and Merciful to both—have mercy on me with mercy that will suffice me.

azkar.text: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ
azkar.transliteration: ya hayyu ya qayyum birahmatika astaghith aslih li sha'ni kullah
azkar.translation: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer, I seek help by Your mercy; set all my affairs in order.

azkar.text: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
azkar.transliteration: hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa 'alayhi tawakkaltu
azkar.translation: Allah is sufficient for me; there is no god but Him. In Him I put my trust.

azkar.text: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
azkar.transliteration: rabbana atina fi ad-dunya hasanatan wa fi al-akhirah hasanatan
azkar.translation: Our Lord, grant us good in this world and good in the Hereafter.

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ
azkar.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry, grief, incapacity, and laziness.

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ
azkar.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka al-huda wa at-taqa wal-'afafa

azkar.translation: Glorified is Allah, and praised is Him.
Glorified is Allah, and praised is Him, by the number of His creation.

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ سَعَةً فِي الرِّزْقِ
azkar.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka sa'atan fi ar-rizq

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً
azkar.transliteration: allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَبْتَغِي مِنْكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى
azkar.transliteration: allahumma inni abtaghi minka al-huda wa at-taqa

azkar.text: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ سَلِيَّتِي فِي نَوَائِبِ الْحَوَادِثِ
azkar.transliteration: allahumma anta saliyati fi nawib al-hawadith
